user.title: Connect to FGC Open Data
user.description: Optionally provide your own FGC open-data API key for a higher rate limit. Leave blank to use anonymous access.

station.title: Choose a station
station.description: Pick the first station to monitor. You can add more later from the integration's Configure options.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect FGC Trains
reauth_confirm.description: Your FGC open-data API key stopped working. Enter a new one, or leave it blank to fall back to anonymous access.

error.invalid_auth: The provided API key was rejected.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the FGC open-data API.

abort.already_configured: FGC Trains is already set up. Add or remove stations from its Configure options.

api_key.title: Update API key
api_key.description: Replace the FGC open-data API key used by this integration. Leave blank to switch to anonymous access.

add_station.title: Add station(s)
add_station.description: Pick one or more stations to start monitoring. Each gets its own departure sensor(s).

remove_station.title: Remove station(s)
remove_station.description: Pick which currently-monitored stations to stop tracking.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Turn optional features on or off. The first three are on by default; the rest are niche extras that are off by default to keep things tidy and save on API requests.

data.enable_map: Live train positions on the map
data.enable_air_quality: Air quality sensors near your stations

abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the FGC open-data API.
abort.no_stations_available: Every station is already being monitored.
